name: Tofu Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the onions, vegetable stock, crushed tomatoes, carrots, and celery. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Add okra, red and green bell peppers, yellow squash, corn, garlic, Cajun Spice, paprika, fennel powder, and red pepper flakes. Continue simmering for another 10 minutes.
4. Stir in the tofu and simmer an additional 10 minutes. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Serve hot.
Serving size: 1 cup (116 calories, 2.3g fat, 0mg cholesterol, 152mg sodium)
